'''Ral Falan''' was a high ranking Human commander in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
Falan was stationed at [[Bestine IV/Legends|Bestine IV]] and was critical to the operation of the planet's oceanic floating shipyards. At some point after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] took notice of the man's importance and his cache of secrets which they suspected to be "galaxy wide," and assigned a [[Defiler]] to put together a squad with the goal of abducting Falan. A [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Consortium]] [[TZ-15 shuttle]] landed on the planet and began its assault in broad daylight. The [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Consoritum's's]] abduction squad consisted of 9 [[Droideka Mark II|Droideka Mk. IIs]], 2 [[MZ-8 Mobile Pulse Cannon]]s, and was led by [[IG-88A/Legends|IG-88]]. Although Falan was well-defended at the small military base, IG-88's team routed the defenders and turned Falan over to the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] as per his contract. [[Interrogation droid/Legends|Interrogation droids]] then went to work on extracting Falan's secrets from his mind.
